content:
name is made up, based on latin words

mori = death

mens = mind

The original chinese name is 忘却前夜 which means "eve of forgetting" and is seen in game as "faded legacy"

||nope, it was a completely different investigator. the reason it had Dexter's name on it is because N can clearly corroborate his own alibi||

Can awakeners exist outside mythag without someone to like awaken them?
possible, but they will need a summoner (to create them) and a linker (so they dont go insane instantly)
also caraboo lore?
Yeah but in daffodil’s character story horla was an awakaner living alone
Also in 7th chapter Juliette is also an awakaner without linker no?
oh horla is still linked to someone. she has permission from mythag to live outside campus because her risk profile is low
Wait awakeners don’t have to be close to your linker in order to exist?
theres no confirmation that juliette is an awakaner yet, its just popular speculation. miryam is a better example of an awakener walking around without a live linker
She’s just built different
there might be a proximity element, but given how helot can go to the south pole while her linkers are in leonia, its pretty lenient
maybe the distance only plays a factor when you want to control an awakener
Oh rlly I thought it was mentioned in the story
nope, we only know that she used to be salv's protege
